task_objective: Move export format dropdown next to download button
design_decisions: Moved 'export_format' selectbox from sidebar to the main results display.
Used st.columns([0.2, 0.8]) to align the format selector and download button side-by-side.
Set label_visibility='collapsed' for the format selector to maintain a clean horizontal alignment.
results: Improved user flow by co-locating export settings with the export action. All tests passed.
